sourceTitle: Generative AI Tool Guidance | Teaching @ JHU
evidenceSnippetOriginal: One prominent use case is in content creation and course development. These tools can assist instructional designers and educators in generating engaging and interactive course materials, ranging from automated quizzes and assessments to case studies and customized learning modules.
